channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9219] conf-sanity test_56: failed with timeout
item.description:
== conf-sanity test 56: check big OST indexes and out-of-index-order start == 05:49:09 (1471672149)
Loading modules from /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/..
detected 2 online CPUs by sysfs
Force libcfs to create 2 CPU partitions
../libcfs/libcfs/libcfs options: 'cpu_npartitions=2 cpu_npartitions=2'
debug=-1
subsystem_debug=all -lnet -lnd -pinger
../lnet/lnet/lnet options: 'accept=all'
../lnet/klnds/socklnd/ksocklnd options: 'sock_timeout=10'
gss/krb5 is not supported
quota/lquota options: 'hash_lqs_cur_bits=3'

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:MDT0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x61
(MDT first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=192.168.112.29@tcp sys.timeout=20 lov.stripesize=1048576 lov.stripecount=0 mdt.identity_upcall=/usr/sbin/l_getidentity

device size = 488MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vdb
target name lustre:MDT0000
4k blocks 50000
options -J size=16 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O large_xattr,dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:MDT0000 -J size=16 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O large_xattr,dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F /dev/vdb 50000
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:MDT0001
Index: 1
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x61
(MDT first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=192.168.112.29@tcp sys.timeout=20 lov.stripesize=1048576 lov.stripecount=0 mdt.identity_upcall=/usr/sbin/l_getidentity

device size = 488MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vdc
target name lustre:MDT0001
4k blocks 50000
options -J size=16 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O large_xattr,dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:MDT0001 -J size=16 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O large_xattr,dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F /dev/vdc 50000
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:OST2710
Index: 10000
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x62
(OST first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=192.168.112.29@tcp sys.timeout=20

device size = 683MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vdb
target name lustre:OST2710
4k blocks 50000
options -I 256 -q -O extents,uninit_bg,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -G 256 -E lazy_itable_init,resize=4290772992,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:OST2710 -I 256 -q -O extents,uninit_bg,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -G 256 -E lazy_itable_init,resize=4290772992,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F /dev/vdb 50000
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:OST03e8
Index: 1000
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x62
(OST first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=192.168.112.29@tcp sys.timeout=20

device size = 683MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vdc
target name lustre:OST03e8
4k blocks 50000
options -I 256 -q -O extents,uninit_bg,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -G 256 -E lazy_itable_init,resize=4290772992,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:OST03e8 -I 256 -q -O extents,uninit_bg,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -G 256 -E lazy_itable_init,resize=4290772992,lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init=0 -F /dev/vdc 50000
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata
start mgs service on fre1229
Starting mgs: /dev/vdd /mnt/mgs
fre1229: mount.lustre: according to /etc/mtab /dev/vdd is already mounted on /mnt/mgs
pdsh@fre1231: fre1229: ssh exited with exit code 17
Start of /dev/vdd on mgs failed 17
start mds service on fre1229
Starting mds1: -o rw,user_xattr /dev/vdb /mnt/mds1
fre1229: mount.lustre: set /sys/block/vdb/queue/max_sectors_kb to 2147483647
fre1229:
fre1229: mount.lustre: mount /dev/vdb at /mnt/mds1 failed: Address already in use
fre1229: The target service's index is already in use. (/dev/vdb)
pdsh@fre1231: fre1229: ssh exited with exit code 98
Start of /dev/vdb on mds1 failed 98
start ost1 service on fre1230
Starting ost1: -o user_xattr /dev/vdb /mnt/ost1
fre1230: mount.lustre: set /sys/block/vdb/queue/max_sectors_kb to 2147483647
fre1230:
Started lustre-OST2710
start ost2 service on fre1230
Starting ost2: -o user_xattr /dev/vdc /mnt/ost2
fre1230: mount.lustre: set /sys/block/vdc/queue/max_sectors_kb to 2147483647
fre1230:
Started lustre-OST03e8
mount lustre on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: fre1231: -o user_xattr,flock fre1229@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
John L. Hammond (john.hammond@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/28233/
Subject: LU-9219 tests: add missing mgs reformat to conf-sanity/56
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_10
Current Patch Set:
Commit: d892b2813854e09dcb78144bbf109692af1e65f7

Minh Diep (minh.diep@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/28233
Subject: LU-9219 tests: add missing mgs reformat to conf-sanity/56
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_10
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 51a00ac314cde9879b355ceba58540578274e480

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/26029/
Subject: LU-9219 tests: add missing mgs reformat to conf-sanity/56
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 75eb91aeabcd167fe586e5e0f707cee5e8966133

jadhav.vikram (jadhav.vikram@seagate.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/26029
Subject: LU-9219 tests: add missing mgs reformat to conf-sanity/56
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 14e3c404e77ecfbffc4c5744a1b5942b872d1da2
